rationale: Section 2 does not address residence homestead exemptions, which are separately authorized by Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b. The null-and-void clause in §2(a) does not override the specific later-enacted homestead authorization in §1-b.
quote: all laws exempting property from taxation other than the property mentioned in this Section shall be null and void
_note: No conflict; homestead exemptions are authorized under art. VIII, §1-b, not §2. The proposed increase in exemption amount is a statutory change within legislature's authority under §1-b(c).
